Bash(git -C /Users/sageryza/Documents/timeline/memory-library-react commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add board sharing feature with personalized invitations

Users can now share boards via link with a personalized message like
"Sophie shared 76 memories with Matthew". Recipients see a landing page
and can view/edit the board collaboratively in real-time.

New components:
- ShareBoardModal for generating share links
- SharedBoardContainer, SharedBoardLanding, SharedBoardView for recipients
- useSharedBoards hook for Firebase operations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /Users/sageryza/Documents/timeline/memory-library-react commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add view tracking for shared boards

Sender can now see:
- Whether recipient opened the share link
- First/last viewed timestamps
- Total view count
- Activity log (which memories viewed, connections made)

Tracking UI shown in "Your Shared Boards" section of Share modal.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /Users/sageryza/Documents/timeline/memory-library-react commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Switch to auto-account approach for shared boards

When recipient opens share link:
- Auto-creates anonymous Firebase account
- Imports shared board + memories into their account
- Redirects to real /conspiracy-board with full features

If they later sign up/sign in:
- Anonymous account links to new credentials
- All imported data is preserved

This gives recipients the full app experience instead of
a limited shared board viewer.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add mobile touch support with pinch-to-zoom

Mobile improvements:
- Single-finger panning on the canvas
- Pinch-to-zoom between 50%, 75%, and 100% zoom levels
- Touch dragging for memory cards (with 200ms delay to distinguish from scroll)
- Long-press (500ms) on canvas for context menu
- Default zoom set to 75% on mobile for better visibility

Key fix: Dynamic transform origin set to viewport center so zoom
happens around what you''re looking at, not a fixed corner point.
This was the critical insight - the previous static origin at (0,0)
caused the view to jump based on screen size.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
